actionType.title: Action Type
actionType.description: Controls which operation runs. Accepted values: BOOK_APPOINTMENT, GET_APPOINTMENTS, CANCEL_APPOINTMENT, RESCHEDULE_APPOINTMENT. Set this based on the patient's confirmed intent.

healthcareProviderRecordId.title: HealthcareProvider Record Id
healthcareProviderRecordId.description: Passed from the doctor-finding topic as a conversation variable. Required for BOOK_APPOINTMENT only. Do not ask the patient.

patientUserId.title: Patient User Id
patientUserId.description: Pass the Loggedin patient id through variable Onco_LoggenIn_User_Id

serviceAppointmentId.title: Service Appointment Id
serviceAppointmentId.description: The Id of the appointment to act on. Required for CANCEL_APPOINTMENT and RESCHEDULE_APPOINTMENT. Obtain from the appointmentResultsJson output of a prior GET_APPOINTMENTS call. No need to get this id for Booking an appointment.

startTime.title: Start Time
startTime.description: Pass the start Time for booking appointment
